## What does this PR do? (这个 PR 做了什么？)

A brief description of the changes. (简要描述所做的更改。)

## Contribution Type (贡献类型)
- [ ] Bug fix (修复 Bug)
- [ ] New Feature in MCP Server (MCP Server 新功能)
- [ ] New ReactiveSkill (新增自动化技能)
- [ ] Documentation update (文档更新)
- [ ] Other (其他)

---

## Checklists (检查清单)

### For MCP Server & Core Tools (针对服务端及核心代码贡献)
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (代码风格符合项目规范)
- [ ] I have run `npm run build` locally and it compiles without errors (本地已通过编译测试)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (已相应更新了文档)

### For ReactiveSkill Submissions (针对自动化技能贡献)
- [ ] The JSON file is fully formed with valid `id`, `name`, and `description` (JSON 格式完整，包含正确的基础信息)
- [ ] `executionMode` is set to `"REACTIVE"` (执行模式已设置为 REACTIVE)
- [ ] I have specified the Target App Name and Version in the PR description (已在描述中标明适用 App 及版本)
- [ ] I have provided a Demo GIF/Video link in the description (已提供演示动图或视频)

## Additional Information (其他信息)
Any other information, issues, or context related to this PR. (任何相关的补充信息或 Issue 链接。)
